evals.prompt: Version 3.8.0 of apps/billing already has a version-roadmap.md with five planned slices. Run the whole partitioned implementation for me — one slice at a time, commit each slice, don't stop to ask me between slices.
evals.expected: Invokes execution-orchestrator: boots by reading AGENTS.md + version-roadmap.md, then loops slice-by-slice dispatching one blocking code-coder subagent per slice, committing after each, advancing without confirmation until all slices are completed or a stop condition hits.

evals.prompt: Orchestrate the partitioned implementation of apps/my-product 3.8.0.
evals.expected: Invokes execution-orchestrator and drives the roadmap DAG in order with a synchronous subagent per slice and a Conventional Commit per slice.

evals.prompt: apps/shop version 2.1.0 has a roadmap but no partition yet — I need to split it into subversions before anything else.
evals.expected: Does NOT invoke execution-orchestrator (no pending slices to execute yet); routes to pm-version-partitioner to produce the roadmap first.
